features.name: RMS Pre-processing
features.description: Pre-processing before RMS/VAD (high-pass, noise gate, normalize)
features.note: Currently delegated to RMS stage, no unique logic

features.name: Spectral VAD Extended Range
features.description: Optimized spectral VAD with extended frequency range
features.note: Uses same spectralVad module as vad_stage.js

features.name: Optimized Speaker Profile Building
features.description: Lower thresholds for real audio (minConfidence 0.15, minFrames 5)

features.name: Per-Track Threshold with Loudness Bias
features.description: Same as vad_stage.js, no unique logic

unique_to_optimized: Different default values for speaker profile (lower thresholds)

conclusion: vad_stage_optimized.js is mostly a subset of vad_stage.js with slightly different defaults. The only unique value is the lower speaker profile thresholds. All other features are either duplicated or missing.
recommendation: Merge the optimized speaker profile defaults into vad_stage.js, then remove vad_stage_optimized.js entirely.
